arrow_back

Store Analytics

@if (store?.name) {

{{ store.name }}

}
@if (error) {
error {{ error }}
} @if (loading) {
@for (s of [1,2,3,4,5,6]; track s) {
}
} @else if (!analytics) {
bar_chart

No analytics data yet. Start selling to see your stats.

} @else {
@for (card of statCards; track card.label) {
{{ card.icon }}
{{ card.value }}
{{ card.label }}
}
@if (analytics.ordersByStatus) {

pie_chart
Orders by Status

@for (entry of (analytics.ordersByStatus | keyvalue); track entry.key) {
{{ entry.value }}
{{ entry.key }}
}
} @if (analytics.topProducts?.length > 0) {

star
Top Products

@for (p of analytics.topProducts; track p._id ?? $index; let i = $index) {
{{ i + 1 }}

{{ p.title ?? p.name ?? '—' }}

${{ (p.revenue ?? 0).toFixed(2) }}

{{ p.unitsSold ?? 0 }} sold

}
} }
